seoTitle: Wilpinjong vs Wilton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wilpinjong and Wilton. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wilpinjong and Wilton.
heading: Wilpinjong vs Wilton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wilpinjong, New South Wales and Wilton, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wilpinjong has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Wilton (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wilpinjong or Wilton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wilpinjong has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Wilton scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wilpinjong scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Wilton scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wilpinjong or Wilton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wilpinjong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
